# services.nominatim

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.nominatim`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.nominatim.database.apiUser` | `string` | Postgresql database user with read-only permissions used for Nominatim web API service. |
| `services.nominatim.database.dbname` | `string` | Name of the postgresql database. |
| `services.nominatim.database.extraConnectionParams` | `null or string` | Extra Nominatim database connection parameters. Format: <param1>=<value1>;<param2>=<value2> See <https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-connect.html#LIBPQ-PARAMKEYWORDS>. |
| `services.nominatim.database.host` | `string` | Host of the postgresql server. If not set to `localhost`, Nominatim database and postgresql superuser with appropriate permissions must exist on target host. |
| `services.nominatim.database.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | Password file used for Nominatim database connection. Must be readable only for the Nominatim web API user. The file must be a valid `.pgpass` file as described in: <https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-pgpass.html> In most cases, the following will be enough: `*:*:*:*:<password>` |
| `services.nominatim.database.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the postgresql database. |
| `services.nominatim.database.superUser` | `string` | Postgresql database superuser used to create Nominatim database and import data. If `database.host` is set to `localhost`, a unix user and group of the same name will be automatically created. |
| `services.nominatim.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nominatim. Also enables nginx virtual host management. Further nginx configuration can be done by adapting `services.nginx.virtualHosts.<name>`. See [](#opt-services.nginx.virtualHosts). |
| `services.nominatim.hostName` | `string` | Hostname to use for the nginx vhost. |
| `services.nominatim.package` | `package` | The nominatim-api package to use. |
| `services.nominatim.settings` | `attribute set of string` | Nominatim configuration settings. For the list of available configuration options see <https://nominatim.org/release-docs/latest/customize/Settings>. |
| `services.nominatim.ui.config` | `null or string` | Nominatim UI configuration placed to theme/config.theme.js file. For the list of available configuration options see <https://github.com/osm-search/nominatim-ui/blob/master/dist/config.defaults.js>. |
| `services.nominatim.ui.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Nominatim UI. |
| `services.nominatim.ui.package` | `package` | The nominatim-ui package to use. |
